summary: Fresh-project doctor now routes agents to a safe init preview instead of repeated raw recovery actions: agent_next reports missing .opennori state, recommends nori-project-health, provides safe_next_command for opennori init preview, and the init preview does not create .opennori until confirmation.
reviewability: Rerun the temporary-project smoke and confirm doctor.data.agent_next.safe_next_command points to opennori init --root <tmp> --json; confirm init preview leaves .opennori absent until --confirm; inspect nori-project-health Skill for concise human summary guidance.
limitations: This validates installed-machine/new-project routing in local source checkout; published npm users need a later package release to receive it.
